name: 6" x 3" LED Flameless Black Wick Candle White - Threshold™: Realistic Faux Pillar, Wax Exterior, Battery Operated
description:
Add a realistic touch to your space while lighting up for special holidays and celebrations with the LED Flameless Black Wick Candle from Threshold™. This flameless candle looks like a pillar candle, with an LED bulb fitted inside. With a realistic black wick, this LED candle will add a warm and inviting touch to your decor. Pair with candles of different heights and mix it in with other decorative elements.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
